zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前价格围绕64100上方窄幅震荡，整体维持高位整理结构，多头略占优势但动能放缓，短线进入盘整蓄势阶段，市场等待方向选择信号

MACD指标持续保持正值运行，显示多头趋势仍在延续，但柱状动能有所收敛。均线系统方面，价格站稳20日均线之上，趋势支撑较为稳固

上方阻力集中于64200至64500区间，若放量突破有望延续上行趋势；下方首要支撑位63674对应20日均线，失守则关注63000整数关口

操作上建议以区间交易为主，等待有效突破后再顺势跟进，避免在窄幅震荡中追涨杀跌，同时控制仓位并设置合理止损提升风险管理效率

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently moving in a tight consolidation phase around 64,152, showing a mild upward bias after holding above the 20-period simple moving average at 63,674. Price action remains compressed between 64,024 and 64,211, indicating low volatility and equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The broader structure suggests a short-term recovery phase rather than a strong trend, with momentum gradually stabilizing after recent fluctuations.

Indicator readings reflect a neutral-to-slightly bullish tone. The price holding above the 20-SMA suggests short-term support is intact, while MACD at 157.38 indicates positive momentum, though confirmation from the signal line is missing. Without RSI data, momentum strength is inferred from price stability, suggesting neither overbought nor oversold conditions. Overall indicators point to consolidation with a mild upward drift continuation.

Immediate support is seen at 64,000, aligned with the psychological level and recent intraday lows, followed by stronger support near the 20-SMA at 63,674 and deeper defense around 63,200. On the upside, resistance is forming at 64,211, with further hurdles at 64,500 and 65,000. A break above resistance could signal renewed bullish expansion. Sustained trading above 64,200 would strengthen short-term bullish momentum and attract breakout buyers.

From a trading perspective, the market favors range-bound strategies until a decisive breakout occurs. Buying near support around 64,000 or the 63,674 SMA zone may offer favorable risk-reward setups, with protective stops below 63,600. Profit targets can be scaled toward 64,211 and 64,500. Alternatively, a breakout above 64,211 could justify momentum long positions targeting 65,000. Risk management remains essential given the current low-volatility compression phase.
